message:
🐛 Fix button nesting violation in MissionRow (#700)

The MissionRow component had a <button> (log toggle) nested inside
another <button> (row toggle), causing a React DOM nesting violation:
"Warning: validateDOMNesting(...): <button> cannot appear as a
descendant of <button>."

Fix: Change the outer button to a div with role="button", tabIndex={0},
and keyboard handlers for accessibility. The inner log toggle button
remains a proper button element.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
